_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

data.name: trg_decks_insert_no_mixed_content
trg_decks_move_no_mixed_content
data.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_decks_move_no_mixed_content
BEFORE UPDATE OF parent_id ON decks
WHEN NEW.parent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND NEW.parent_id IS NOT OLD.parent_id
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM flashcards
    WHERE deck_id = NEW.parent_id AND deleted_at IS NULL
  )
BEGIN
  SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'deck-mixed-content');
END;

data.name: trg_flashcards_insert_no_mixed_content
trg_flashcards_move_no_mixed_content
data.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_flashcards_move_no_mixed_content
BEFORE UPDATE OF deck_id ON flashcards
WHEN NEW.deck_id IS NOT OLD.deck_id
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM decks WHERE parent_id = NEW.deck_id)
BEGIN
  SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'deck-mixed-content');
END;

data.name: trg_flashcards_restore_no_mixed_content
data.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_flashcards_restore_no_mixed_content
BEFORE UPDATE OF deleted_at ON flashcards
WHEN NEW.deleted_at IS NULL AND OLD.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM decks WHERE parent_id = NEW.deck_id)
BEGIN
  SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'deck-mixed-content');
END;

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_study_sessions_single_active ON study_sessions (state)
  WHERE state = 'active';

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "language_pairs" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "learning_language_code" TEXT NOT NULL, "native_language_code" TEXT NOT NULL, "normalized_pair_key" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "decks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "language_pair_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES language_pairs(id), "parent_id" TEXT REFERENCES decks(id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "normalized_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "flashcards" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "deck_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES decks(id), "term" TEXT NOT NULL, "primary_meaning" TEXT NOT NULL, "content_version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "is_hidden" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (is_hidden IN (0, 1)), "deleted_at" INTEGER, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TRIGGER trg_decks_insert_no_mixed_content BEFORE INSERT ON decks WHEN NEW.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM flashcards WHERE deck_id = NEW.parent_id AND deleted_at IS NULL) BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-mixed-content');END

CREATE TRIGGER trg_decks_move_no_mixed_content BEFORE UPDATE OF parent_id ON decks WHEN NEW.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND NEW.parent_id IS NOT OLD.parent_id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM flashcards WHERE deck_id = NEW.parent_id AND deleted_at IS NULL) BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-mixed-content');END
CREATE TRIGGER trg_flashcards_insert_no_mixed_content BEFORE INSERT ON flashcards WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM decks WHERE parent_id = NEW.deck_id) BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-mixed-content');END

CREATE TRIGGER trg_flashcards_move_no_mixed_content BEFORE UPDATE OF deck_id ON flashcards WHEN NEW.deck_id IS NOT OLD.deck_id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM decks WHERE parent_id = NEW.deck_id) BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-mixed-content');END

CREATE TRIGGER trg_flashcards_restore_no_mixed_content BEFORE UPDATE OF deleted_at ON flashcards WHEN NEW.deleted_at IS NULL AND OLD.deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM decks WHERE parent_id = NEW.deck_id) BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-mixed-content');END
CREATE TRIGGER trg_decks_insert_no_self_parent BEFORE INSERT ON decks WHEN NEW.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND NEW.parent_id = NEW.id BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-cycle');END

CREATE TRIGGER trg_decks_move_no_cycle BEFORE UPDATE OF parent_id ON decks WHEN NEW.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND NEW.parent_id IS NOT OLD.parent_id AND(NEW.parent_id = NEW.id OR EXISTS (WITH RECURSIVE descendants (id) AS (SELECT id FROM decks WHERE parent_id = NEW.id UNION ALL SELECT d.id FROM decks AS d INNER JOIN descendants AS s ON d.parent_id = s.id) SELECT 1 FROM descendants WHERE id = NEW.parent_id))BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-cycle');END

CREATE TRIGGER trg_decks_insert_same_pair BEFORE INSERT ON decks WHEN NEW.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM decks WHERE id = NEW.parent_id) AND (SELECT language_pair_id FROM decks WHERE id = NEW.parent_id) IS NOT NEW.language_pair_id BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-pair-mismatch');END

CREATE TRIGGER trg_decks_move_same_pair BEFORE UPDATE OF parent_id ON decks WHEN NEW.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND NEW.parent_id IS NOT OLD.parent_id AND (SELECT language_pair_id FROM decks WHERE id = NEW.parent_id) IS NOT NEW.language_pair_id BEGIN SELECT RAISE (ABORT, 'deck-pair-mismatch');END

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "study_sessions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "session_type" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (session_type IN ('newLearning', 'dueReview', 'relearn', 'practice')), "deck_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES decks(id), "scope" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (scope IN ('leaf', 'subtree')), "state" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (state IN ('active', 'completed', 'abandoned')), "revision" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "snapshot_version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "schedule_srs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (schedule_srs IN (0, 1)), "started_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "finalized_at" INTEGER, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_study_sessions_single_active ON study_sessions (state) WHERE state = 'active'

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "study_session_cards" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "session_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES study_sessions(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES flashcards(id), "display_order" INTEGER NOT NULL, "term_snapshot" TEXT NOT NULL, "meaning_snapshot" TEXT NOT NULL, "content_version" INTEGER NOT NULL, "progress_box_snapshot" INTEGER NOT NULL, "progress_revision" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, UNIQUE(session_id, card_id), UNIQUE(session_id, display_order));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "study_checkpoints" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "session_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES study_sessions(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "stage_index" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "round_index" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "card_position" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "failed_set_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', "timer_state_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "state_version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "study_round_orders" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "session_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES study_sessions(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "round_index" INTEGER NOT NULL, "seed" INTEGER NOT NULL, "card_order_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, UNIQUE(session_id, round_index));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "session_relearn_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "session_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES study_sessions(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES flashcards(id), "retry_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, UNIQUE(session_id, card_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "study_attempts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "idempotency_key" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES flashcards(id), "session_id" TEXT REFERENCES study_sessions(id), "mode_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "outcome" TEXT NOT NULL, "evidence_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_terminal" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (is_terminal IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX idx_study_attempts_card ON study_attempts (card_id)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "learning_progress" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "card_id" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES flashcards(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "box" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (box BETWEEN 0 AND 8), "due_at" INTEGER, "policy_id" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'leitner-8-box-v1', "policy_version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "revision" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "repetition_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "lapse_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "last_terminal_attempt_id" TEXT REFERENCES study_attempts(id), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, CHECK((box IN (0, 8) AND due_at IS NULL)OR(box BETWEEN 1 AND 7 AND due_at IS NOT NULL)));
CREATE INDEX idx_learning_progress_due ON learning_progress (due_at)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "preferences" ("pref_key" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "value_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "value_schema_version" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "daily_goals" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "is_enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (is_enabled IN (0, 1)), "target_card_count" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (target_card_count > 0), "effective_from_local_date" TEXT NOT NULL, "timezone_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "goal_day_progress" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "local_date" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "timezone_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "goal_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES daily_goals(id), "qualified_card_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (qualified_card_count >= 0), "target_snapshot" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_met" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (is_met IN (0, 1)), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "streak_days" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "local_date" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "timezone_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "qualified_source" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_decks_root_sibling_name ON decks (language_pair_id, normalized_name) WHERE parent_id IS NULL
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_decks_child_sibling_name ON decks (parent_id, normalized_name) WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL
CREATE INDEX idx_flashcards_deck ON flashcards (deck_id)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "flashcard_translations" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES flashcards(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "language_code" TEXT NOT NULL, "translation_text" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_order" INTEGER NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, UNIQUE(card_id, language_code, display_order));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tags" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "normalized_name" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "flashcard_tags" ("card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES flashcards(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "tag_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tags(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(card_id, tag_id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "card_audio_refs" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "card_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES flashcards(id)ON DELETE CASCADE, "language_code" TEXT NOT NULL, "asset_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "provider" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX idx_card_audio_refs_card ON card_audio_refs (card_id)
